8BitDo 64 Bluetooth Controller for Analogue 3D, Switch 2, and more

Buy for $27 (Reg. $45)

Apply LEVEL22 during checkout.

What we love

8BitDo’s latest N64-style controller keeps the familiar button layout but puts it in a more comfortable, modern shell. Buy for $22 (Reg. $30)

What we love

There are loads of Find My keychain accessories out there, but Satechi’s FindAll is easily one of the most elegant options in the now even lower price range. A huge selection of Switch 2 and PS5 games is also part of this sale, and you can save up to a whopping 83% by cashing in on many of these deals. items.title: Driving With Suspended Licence Could Mean Up To Three Years In Jail Under New Bill
items.summary:
The Malaysian government is proposing harsher penalties for motorists who continue driving despite having their licences suspended or revoked. Under the Road Transport (Amendment) Bill 2026, offenders could face up to three years’ imprisonment if found guilty. The proposed change comes through an amendment to Section 32 of the Road Transport Act 1987 (Act 333). […]

items.title: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app
items.summary: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks.
